personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS, PySpark, SQL & Data Platform Modernization

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience, including banking-scale data platforms, Python/PySpark ETL, SQL optimization, AWS data services, and production observability. Strong background designing and supporting large-scale pipelines, governed data workflows, reporting layers, and operational controls in regulated financial environments. Currently expanding hands-on modern data stack capabilities across Snowflake, dbt, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, and Terraform, with a practical bridge from AWS Glue, Athena, S3, Redshift, Spark, SQL, and enterprise governance.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual processes with governed, repeatable data workflows.
Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift analytics workloads, and Oracle retention schemas to support scalable forecasting and reporting.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention structures for large telemetry datasets, supporting seasonal analysis, performance review, and long-running enterprise reporting needs.
Developed PySpark and Python processing patterns for large-scale telemetry and capacity datasets, improving throughput, maintainability, and repeatability across pipeline workloads.
Created executive dashboards and reporting layers using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to turn infrastructure telemetry into stakeholder-ready business and operational insight.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting datasets, improving traceability and consistency across data sources.
Applied data quality, validation, and reconciliation practices to telemetry and reporting pipelines, supporting trusted outputs for capacity, provisioning, and infrastructure decision-making.
Collaborated with engineering, operations, and leadership teams in a regulated banking environment, translating complex platform issues into clear findings, next steps, and production improvements.
Supported production readiness through monitoring, alerting, incident analysis, runbook-style operational practices, and proactive issue prevention across data and observability workflows.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical systems, supporting production observability, transaction tracing, and performance analysis.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Built operational analytics and QLIK reporting around application performance data, helping stakeholders understand customer-impacting trends and system behavior.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero production monitoring regression during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing, transaction behavior, and APM telemetry for release readiness.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for TIAA-CREF, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across a large financial-services environment.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and operational reporting modules adopted as standards across client environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction automation for weekly performance reporting, reducing manual export effort and improving consistency.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades with zero unplanned downtime, coordinating engineering, operations, and application teams.
Provided technical documentation, training, and troubleshooting guidance to improve support readiness and standardize operational practices.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, JDBC bottlenecks, thread constraints, heap pressure, CPU saturation, and garbage-collection issues.
Installed and configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread-dump automation scripts for real-time visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams as release gate inputs.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting transaction volumes at extreme scale.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation frameworks to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation processes to protect integrity through phased cutover.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modernization modules for the IRS CADE project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, and VC++ interfaces backed by DB2 while following government architecture standards.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Oracle Pro*C/PLSQL patterns.
Improved telecom billing processes by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced AMDOCS billing, settlement, reporting, and interface modules across the full billing lifecycle.
Automated WebLogic and WebSphere administration using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and operational steps.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI capabilities and optimized Parquet/Snappy data access for scalable analytics and governed data consumption.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Replaced manual forecasting workflows, created stakeholder-facing dashboards, and supported forecasting against banking-scale telemetry data.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, tailored document generation, quality gates, and tracking. Demonstrates practical Python orchestration, RAG-style retrieval, structured outputs, and AI-assisted development workflow design.
